text: I feel a certain sense of anticipation and curiosity standing here. The dim lighting and neon glow from the room beyond cast an eerie, almost otherworldly atmosphere. The phrase 'R+D' on the wall reminds me that creation and discovery are at the heart of this space. I feel both isolated and intrigued, as if on the verge of encountering something new—a kind of liminal space between ideas and realization.
